response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical depth with experience in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP and code generation tools. Her background as a Staff Engineer and leadership in open-source projects aligns well with the role's technical strategy responsibilities. However, her recent Staff role is very short (only 1 month), and her non-technical experience (e.g., stakeholder management, operational ownership) is less explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong Python/TypeScript background with hands-on experience in AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq)
Proven leadership in technical strategy and open-source projects (GISCollective, founder role)
concerns: Recent Staff role at re:cinq is only 1 month old, raising questions about stability and long-term fit
Limited explicit experience with operational ownership (on-call, incident response) in the resume
Non-technical stakeholder management and agile coordination skills are not prominently highlighted
